title: Recording / Mixing / Mastering Engineer
bio_ja: 1985年東京生まれ。シンセサイザーとサンプリングで曲を作るなかで音響と機材に興味を持ち、エンジニアリングへ傾倒、現在に至る。好きなものは大きい音像と大きい服と大きい本屋。機材と植物と猫は大きくても小さくても好きです。ジャンルと時代を問わず、人が作り上げたものを大事にしています。
bio_en: Born in Tokyo in 1985, I started making music with synthesizers and sampling, and that process sparked a deep interest in sound and audio equipment, eventually leading me into audio engineering. I’m drawn to big soundscapes, oversized clothes, and large bookstores. When it comes to gear, plants, and cats, I like them both big and small. Across genres and eras, I deeply value what people create.
equipment_note: Please refer to [the studio materials of Arte Refact](https://www.arte-refact.com/studio/) for information on the recording equipment.
